posts.text: Another record high on negative breadth. 8 of the past 12 record highs have seen more decliners  than advancers
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: Many people worry about overpopulation. But an increasing number, especially in rich countries, fret about demographic shrinkage. There are several reasons to doubt the doomsayers https://www.economist.com/leaders/2025/09/11/dont-panic-about-the-global-fertility-crash?taid=6a165038cd9b3d000140fcdd&utm_campaign=editorial-social&utm_content=discovery.content&utm_medium=social-media.content.np&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
Truly incredible.

Micron stock, $MU, is now up another +6% in overnight trading, adding another +$60 billion in market cap in hours.

Just 12 months ago, the entire stock was worth less than $70 billion.

Including the gain during regular trading hours, Micron has now added +$220 BILLION today.

This makes Micron the 12th largest public company in the world.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
